long_description:
[Acadia-SRE]-Storage snapshot action error pending [LON] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/main/control_plane/sysdig_alerts/storage_snapshot_action_error_pending.md
TIP Situation:                      Observed service-error-storage_snapshot_error_pending issue in Acadia-Genctl
TIP Short Description:              Storage snapshot action error pending
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:is-volume-acadia:eu-gb::mzone7a7:microservice: 

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    sum by(kube_cluster_name, kube_pod_name, action) (rate(acadia_storage_snapshot_action_count{action =~"creation|deletion|restore",result=~"error_pending"}[10m])) > 5 = 40.42
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone7a7' and kube_pod_name = 'acadia-snapshot-controller-6bd7cd5cdc-tvrd9' and action = 'deletion'

Time:                12/05/2025 08:05 PM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:           Prometheus
Name:           [Acadia-SRE]-Storage snapshot action error pending [LON]
Description:    Storage snapshot action error pending
Team:           is-volume-acadia
Scope:          
Alert When:     sum by(kube_cluster_name, kube_pod_name, action) (rate(acadia_storage_snapshot_action_count{action =~"creation|deletion|restore",result=~"error_pending"}[10m])) > 5
